name: Backyard Bar Wars
overview: A send-up of the classic home reno show based on the rising trend of DIY at-home bars. The series combines hilarious moments of comedian and host, Chris Distefano, roasting the builders in a way that only he can. The one thing that’s not a joke are the bars themselves – viewers can expect jaw-dropping reveals that will leave everyone watching thirsty for a second round.

trailers.title: Backyard Bar Wars - Season 1 Official Trailer | truTV
